allow: Bash(grep -rh "^import\\|^from" backend/ test-engine/ tools/ --include="*.py" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^\(import|from\) [a-z_]+|^from [a-z_]+ import" | sed 's/ as .*//' | sed 's/ import.*//' | grep -v "^import\\|^from \\." | sort -u)

Bash(grep -rh "^import\\|^from" backend/ test-engine/ --include="*.py" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^import\\|^from \\." | grep "^from [a-z_]" | cut -d' ' -f2 | cut -d'.' -f1 | sort -u | grep -v "^backend$\\|^core$\\|^tools$\\|^datetime$\\|^pathlib$\\|^typing$\\|^sqlalchemy$\\|^pydantic$\\|^fastapi$")
